query: I explicitly want to run $powerset login on a fresh MacBook with my @powerset.co Google account. Refresh my credentials and local config.
notes: Backcompat explicit-login path. For generic first-run setup, use the powerset skill eval for $powerset setup; this alias should still walk through gcloud auth check, Auth0 PKCE login, GCP secret provisioning, MCP install, and a final doctor check when the user explicitly asks for login.

query: I have a personal @gmail.com account, no @powerset.co. What can I still set up?
notes: Non-Powerset users can use OSS-friendly skills with their own keys, or use per-user GCP Secret Manager env pull when a maintainer has explicitly provisioned that email.

query: I think I already ran powerset-login a while back. Can you verify everything is still healthy?
notes: Verification path: should run doctor, auth whoami, mcp_install status. Should NOT proactively re-run login or re-pull secrets.

query: My MCP suddenly stopped working. claude mcp list says powerset-search failed to connect.
notes: Diagnosis path: most likely token expiry (Auth0 access tokens are 24h). Fix is `auth.py token --bearer-only` (auto-refreshes via stored refresh_token) plus reinstall MCP. Should NOT nuke credentials.
